data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. CADILLAC BELLE carved over from wide out and boxed on strongly to finish 1.5 lengths away in third (17.78) behind Fernando Lee at this track. Remains without a win from the draw but has been in the placings seven times from 11 attempts. Deserves serious consideration. 2. COMPTON SHELLY brought up her 8th career win last start at this track (22.91). Form here at the trip excellent including three wins. Winner at her latest appearance in the quickest time on the card. Can measure up again. 3. CADILLAC RAGTOP was midfield throughout and finished there last time when 4th (17.80) at this track. Smart beginner who should take advantage of the low draw. Should be about the money. 8. ENERGY TO BURN is worth some thought after placing as favourite last start.","runners":[1,2,3,8],"exclusive":false}

extraMarkets.name: MOUNT GAMBIER-R5-Fav Out
extraMarkets.message: Must finish 1st or 2nd behind N/A Runner
